_comment: FalloffType.Element + Move TX: pick the (+0.5,+0.5,+0.5) corner as the sphere centre with radius 0.5. The corner moves full +0.3 along X; the three nearest verts (sharing one axis with the corner) are at distance 1.0 from it — outside the 0.5 sphere → weight 0 → don't move. modo_method=analytical because no MODO preset wraps this exact configuration (`falloff.element` ships only inside ElementMove which also wants click-to-pick + xfrm.transform). Verifies the element-falloff math + Move's headless TX path agree with the spherical-falloff analytical reference.
